name: Cracklin Corn Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the lard in a 6 x 12 inch loaf pan.
2. In a large bowl, mix together the self-rising cornmeal, self-rising flour, sugar, eggs, and buttermilk (or sweet milk) until well combined.
3. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
4. Bake at 425°F for 20 to 25 minutes, or until golden brown and a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
